summary: Iteration 9: Tested Apariencia section in /ajustes - all 3 preset cards (Glass Aurora, Crystal, Minimal), animations toggle, border radius buttons, preset persistence via localStorage, and sidebar footer preset label. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 features all verified: Apariencia section in /ajustes has Color de Acento (6 theme circles), Diseño de la Aplicación (3 preset cards: aurora/crystal/minimal with mini-previews), Animaciones toggle (data-testid=animations-toggle), Estilo de Bordes (radius-rounded/medium/sharp). Minimal hides .mesh-bg via CSS. Preset stored in localStorage key 'preset'. Sidebar footer shows 'v1.0 · {presetName}'. MotionConfig in App.js wraps AppInner. Dashboard and Calendar still working.
